page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmr9ae.48xlarge is an x86_64 architecture bare-metal instance powered by AMD EPYC 9T95 processors. It features 192 dedicated physical cores and 192 vCPUs, operating at a base clock speed of 2.25 GHz with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration. The instance is equipped with 1536.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core.

This instance utilizes the KVM hypervisor and does not include local storage, requiring external network-attached storage solutions. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 100 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers. No GPUs are bundled with this configuration.

Given the high density of dedicated physical AMD EPYC cores and substantial memory capacity, this instance offers high resource density for enterprise workloads. It is designed for memory-intensive applications, large-scale databases, high-performance computing, and heavy virtualization workloads that require dedicated CPU allocation and high network throughput without local storage requirements.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmr9ae.48xlarge is a high-capacity, memory-optimized bare-metal server built on the x86_64 architecture. Powered by AMD EPYC 9T95 processors running at 2.25 GHz, it delivers 192 dedicated physical cores and 192 vCPUs with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration. The system is equipped with 1536.0 GB of RAM, establishing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It operates on the KVM hypervisor and features a baseline network bandwidth of 100 Gbps. This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, making it reliant on network-attached storage. It is engineered for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, large-scale databases, and high-performance computing tasks requiring dedicated CPU resources and high-throughput network connectivity.

tagline: A high-density memory-optimized server featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and high-throughput networking for demanding enterprise workloads.
